runners.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when sixth (23.96) at this track. Has a decent record when drawn the inside but needs to find best form to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when sixth (23.96) at this track. Has a decent record when drawn the inside but needs to find best form to feature.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.82) in a NG, finishing a 15 length eighth. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from six starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.82) in a NG, finishing a 15 length eighth. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from six starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to lose ground shortly after the start; Finished a distant last.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.25 lengths over 411m at this track in a handy (23.51), beating Last Rupee. Will find this a bit tougher, others have better credentials.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2.25 lengths over 411m at this track in a handy (23.51), beating Last Rupee. Will find this a bit tougher, others have better credentials.

runners.formComment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at this track over 300m. The start prior was at his best with a neck win over 300m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at this track over 300m. The start prior was at his best with a neck win over 300m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame at Grafton last time when a 3.5 lengths third but did record a hot 19.93 for the 350m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 411m in 23.37 last start, beating Country Form. Has ability and worth including.

runners.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.75 lengths in a NG last start at Grafton, recording a lightning 19.68 for the 350m journey. Hard to top on that run.
